packages.cli: CLI user-facing stdout/stderr output is intentional
packages.create-app: Scaffolding CLI prints user-facing progress to stdout
packages.cache: Dependency cycle: @open-mercato/shared depends on @open-mercato/cache, so the logger cannot be imported here; the single fallback warn stays on console

files.packages/*/src/**/cli.ts: Module CLI command output (mercato <module> <cmd>) — user-facing stdout/stderr, same category as @open-mercato/cli
files.packages/core/src/modules/api_docs/front: console.log appears only inside a generated code sample string shown to API-docs users, not as a call
files.packages/telemetry/src/nextjs.ts: next.config-eval-safe bootstrap module: @open-mercato/telemetry has no dependency on @open-mercato/shared, and this warn fires exactly when telemetry init failed, so no structured logger is available
